title: ENDDOCUMENT
text: ENDDOCUMENT Operation activated by the SAX parser when the end of an XML document is encountered. Explain this code operation ENDDOCUMENT Implement your code here end; ENDDOCUMENT operation Copy Description ENDDOCUMENT must have no parameters. This operation is the last one activated by PARSE and PARSEFILE . It can occur only once per XML document. After this operation has completed, PARSE and PARSEFILE return. Related Links PARSE Parses a specified XML stream. PARSEFILE Parses an XML document in the specified file. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
